problem id: f18abb65
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(4)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11010101 -> 00110101
  11110100 -> 00111101
  00101110 -> 11011011
  00111100 -> 10111111
  10101000 -> 01101010
  10001111 -> 11111111
  01011010 -> 00010110
  10110110 -> 01101101
  01110010 -> 10011101

query: 00010110
predicted answer: 01011101
